Title: Login after 4 weeks of inactivity
Preconditions: User has not used the application for 4 weeks.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in.

Title: Swipe left to express disinterest in an item
Preconditions: User is browsing items.
Test Steps:
1. Select an item to view its details.
2. Swipe left on the item.
Expected Result: The item is moved to the left and the user is shown the next item.

Title: Swipe right to express interest in an item
Preconditions: User is browsing items.
Test Steps:
1. Select an item to view its details.
2. Swipe right on the item.
Expected Result: The item is moved to the right and the user is shown a message asking if they want to send a match request.

Title: Match request is sent when two users express interest in each other's items
Preconditions: Two users have swiped right on each other's items.
Test Steps:
1. User A swipes right on User B's item.
2. User B swipes right on User A's item.
Expected Result: A match request is sent to both users and they are notified.

Title: Users can chat after a match is made
Preconditions: Two users have matched.
Test Steps:
1. User A accepts the match request.
2. User A sends a message to User B.
3. User B replies to User A's message.
Expected Result: The messages are sent and received correctly.

Title: Users can exchange items after agreeing on the details
Preconditions: Two users have matched and agreed on the details of the exchange.
Test Steps:
1. User A and User B agree on the details of the exchange.
2. User A sends a request to exchange the items.
3. User B accepts the request.
Expected Result: The items are exchanged and both users are notified.

Title: Create Account
Preconditions:
The application is installed on the device.
Trigger: The user opens the application for the first time.
Test Steps:
1. The user opens the application.
2. The user is presented with a registration form.
3. The user enters the required details in the registration form.
4. The user submits the registration form.
Expected Result: The user is able to create an account.

Title: Confirm Email
Preconditions:
The user has completed the registration form.
Trigger: The user clicks on the email confirmation link.
Test Steps:
1. The user clicks on the email confirmation link.
2. The user is redirected to the application.
Expected Result: The user's account is activated and ready for use.

Title: Add Item
Preconditions:
The user is logged into the application.
Trigger: The user navigates to the add item page.
Test Steps:
1. The user navigates to the add item page.
2. The user enters the details of the item to be added.
3. The user submits the item details.
Expected Result: The item is added to the user's profile and is available for barter.

Title: View Other User's Item
Preconditions:
The user has items in their profile.
Trigger: The user navigates to the home page of the application.
Test Steps:
1. The user navigates to the home page of the application.
2. The user views the items of other users.
Expected Result: The user is able to view the items of other users.

Title: Express Interest
Preconditions:
The user has viewed an item of another user.
Trigger: The user swipes right on the item card.
Test Steps:
1. The user views an item of another user.
2. The user swipes right on the item card.
Expected Result: The user has expressed interest in the item.

Title: Match
Preconditions:
Two users have expressed interest in each other's items.
Trigger: One user expresses interest in an item of another user.
Test Steps:
1. User A expresses interest in an item of User B.
2. User B expresses interest in an item of User A.
Expected Result: The system notifies both users of the match.

Title: Chat
Preconditions:
Two users have matched.
Trigger: The users start chatting.
Test Steps:
1. The users start chatting.
2. The users can send and receive messages.
Expected Result: The users can communicate with each other and negotiate the exchange.

Title: Exchange
Preconditions:
The users have agreed on an exchange.
Trigger: The users confirm the exchange.
Test Steps:
1. The users confirm the exchange.
2. The items are exchanged.
Expected Result: The exchange is completed and the chat is archived if the users have not matched on other items.

Title: User can upload items for trade
Preconditions: User has created an account
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the upload item page
2. Select the item to be uploaded
3. Enter a description of the item
4. Click the upload button
Expected Result: The item is successfully uploaded and is visible to other users

Title: User can express interest in another user's item
Preconditions: User has created an account and has uploaded at least one item
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the item page of another user
2. Click the "Express Interest" button
Expected Result: The other user is notified of the interest and can initiate a chat to discuss the trade

Title: Users can chat to discuss trades
Preconditions: Two users have expressed interest in each other's items
Test Steps:
1. Initiate a chat with the other user
2. Send messages related to the trade
Expected Result: The chat is functional and messages are sent and received

Title: User can log in with correct credentials
Preconditions: User has created an account
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the correct username and password
3. Click the login button
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User has installed the application and has registered an account.
Test Steps:
1. User enters email and password.
2. User clicks on the login button.
Expected Result: User is logged in and provided with a token to make requests.

Title: User Profile Creation
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Data: Name, Surname, Date of Birth, Phone, Email, Password, Location
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the register button.
2. User enters personal details.
3. User clicks on the register button.
Expected Result: A new user is created and the user can log in and use the application.

Title: Adding Items to Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the add item button.
2. User enters item details.
3. User clicks on the add item button.
Expected Result: A new item is added to the user's profile and is available for trading.

Title: Match Functionality
Preconditions: Two users have expressed interest in each other's items.
Test Data: Two users with items available for trade.
Test Steps: 1. User A and User B swipe right on each other's items.
Expected Result: A match is created and a notification is sent to both users, and a chat is opened between them.

Title: Chat Functionality
Preconditions: A match has been created between two users.
Test Steps: 1. User A and User B start a conversation in the chat.
Expected Result:
Messages are saved in the database.
These test cases are based on the explicit requirements written in the provided PDF.

Title: User Login

2. Tap the login button
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the home screen and the token is saved for future requests

Title: User Logout
Preconditions: The user is logged in
Test Steps: 1. Tap the logout button
Expected Result: The token previously assigned to the user is removed

Title: Invalid Login
Preconditions: The login screen is displayed to the user
Test Steps:

2. Tap the login button
Expected Result: The user is not redirected to the home screen and an error message is displayed

2. Tap the login button
Expected Result: The user is not redirected to the home screen and an error message is displayed

2. Tap the login button
Expected Result: The user is not redirected to the home screen and an error message is displayed

Test Steps:

2. Enter the password
3. Tap the login button
Expected Result: The user is not redirected to the home screen and an error message is displayed

2. Leave the password field empty
3. Tap the login button
Expected Result: The user is not redirected to the home screen and an error message is displayed

Title: User Login With Special Characters
Preconditions: The login screen is displayed to the user

Test Steps:

2. Tap the login button
Expected Result: The user is not redirected to the home screen and an error message is displayed

Title: User Login With Long Password
Preconditions: The login screen is displayed to the user

2. Tap the login button
